title: Who would win in combat Shinji or SuperSaiyan4 Goku
display_title: Who would win in combat Shinji or SuperSaiyan4 Goku
wikitext:
[]: Who would win in combat: Shinji or SuperSaiyan4 Goku? Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:49 am There's no way this has been discussed before at least. Anyway, it's too close to call... (Insert uproarious emoticon HERE)

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:50 am Mortician69 wrote: too close to call...

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:54 am I thought VS threads where banned? But yeah Shinji against a casual planet buster? What a nice thread for a thread.

[]: Post by toe mash » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:57 am Well, Shinjis got a pretty mean right hook but I think Goku can take him.

[]: Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:01 am They're banned?? Aren't we allowed to fool around a bit here and have fun? Lighten up. The serious stuff I save for the serious thread.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:02 am The answer is obvious thus this thread is pointless [and ridiculous]. To my understanding the only VS. threads that get immediately locked are "Gundams vs. Evangelions" threads.

[]: Post by Ryjin » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:02 am Who would win........ Asuka would.... why, well because in the fight Shinji would just curl up into a ball or freak out while Gouku spends 5 episodes charging up Asuka would just walk on up look at baka Shinji with disgust in her eyes and then promptly walk over to Gouku and kick him in the nuts. The end. Oh and lets keep vs. topics to less then a minimum here, please and thanks.

[]: Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:08 am Actually, I'm just trying to get a feel for how this site is. The first topic I posted got shot down because it's "old". Strange way to treat a newcomer/fellow Eva fan. Just testing the water bro. By the way, Son Kun would win__

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:09 am Ryjin wrote: while Gouku spends 5 episodes charging up Asuka would just walk on up look at baka Shinji with disgust in her eyes and then promptly walk over to Gouku and kick him in the nuts. The end.

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:18 am The only thing Shinji wins here is being something good unlike SSj4 Goku since he is a GT character which was made of fail . But seriously, he dies in the first 0.5 seconds of the battle.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:19 am No versus threads. Period. Goku would kick the shit out of Shinji.
